SEARCH
Module geomed.app
Package geomed.app.algo

Class DispatchEngine

java.lang.Object
geomed.app.algo.DispatchEngine
public class DispatchEngine extends Object
Core decision engine for medical emergency dispatching.

This class evaluates and determines the optimal hospital destination for an incident based on spatial proximity, network routing costs, hospital capacity, medical specialities, and patient history.

  • Method Details

    • evaluateBestDispatch

      public DispatchDecision evaluateBestDispatch(VictimIncident incident, Set<Hospital> hospitals, RoutingEngine routingEngine, List<Triangle> triangles)
      Evaluates all available hospitals to find the optimal dispatch destination for an incident.

      The evaluation limits heavy routing computations to a subset of hospitals determined by Delaunay triangulation neighbors of the geometrically closest hospital.

      Parameters:
      incident - the victim's medical incident details
      hospitals - the set of all available hospitals in the system
      routingEngine - the routing engine used to compute precise topological distances
      triangles - the list of triangles forming the Delaunay triangulation network
      Returns:
      a DispatchDecision containing the chosen hospital and a detailed score map for explainability
